headline: Jim Cramer on Kohl’s Corporation: “It Could Be the Beginning of a Rebuild That’s Worth Watching”
summary: Kohl’s Corporation (NYSE:KSS) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s game plan. Cramer highlighted the company’s new management, as he remarked: Tuesday morning, we get results from Kohl’s, and this earnings season’s been kind to almost all the retailers. Kohl’s, with new management, will most likely be treated well. I like to buy inexpensive […]
